items.title: Best AI in Jul 2026? | ChatGPT (OpenAI top-ranked LLM on LMArena Rank(UB) on Jul 31)
items.rationale: Core: live LMArena Text Arena Overall board (primary source, Jul 10 2026, 7.27M votes) is Anthropic-dominated -> top FIVE slots all Anthropic (claude-fable-5 #1 at 1509), while OpenAI's best (gpt-5.6-sol-xhigh) is rank 8 at 1486, ~23 Elo below #1 with a wide +-14 CI. For YES, OpenAI must ship a new flagship that clears the tight-CI Anthropic cluster and holds the single top Rank(UB) slot within ~20 days; gpt-5.6-sol is already their newest entry. Risk: a surprise post-5.6 OpenAI launch debuting >1502 with enough votes before ~Jul 24. Divergence: Codex family (0.075) slightly above Opus family (0.035) on how much a wide-CI late entrant exploits Rank(UB), but both agree it is a low-probability tail; consensus ~0.055 sits inside the 0.04/0.05 market -> no tradeable edge. Ensemble ran full 2xOpus + 2xCodex(gpt-5.5 xhigh); no round-2 (no crux).
sources: https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text (Text Arena Overall, Jul 10 2026, 7,274,904 votes, 374 models)
Kalshi rules KXLLM1-26JUL31-OAI: resolves YES if OpenAI has top-ranked LLM (LMArena Rank UB) on 2026-07-31

skipped.title: BTC trimmed mean ever above $67,500 by 11:59pm ET Jul 31, 2026?
skipped.reason: SKIP (settlement ambiguity, PROTOCOL tie-law #4) - re-examined the exact $67.5k strike today. Primary rule says 'if price is ever above' (spot touch) but secondary methodology resolves on a trimmed mean of the CUMULATIVE minute dataset (an average, far harder to breach). Independent check: BTC spot $64,352 (Coinbase), July daily highs ~$63.4k-$64.7k -> never touched $67.5k this cycle. Market at coin-flip 0.49. A liquid MM holding minute BRTI data prices this; the touch-vs-cumulative-average ambiguity is not resolvable to real-money precision. Reaffirms 07-10 arbiter KILL of this strike.

skipped.title: BTC trimmed mean ever above $70,000 by 11:59pm ET Jul 31, 2026?
skipped.reason: SKIP (settlement ambiguity, PROTOCOL tie-law #4; consistent with 07-10 arbiter KILL of the sibling $67.5k strike). Same 'cumulative dataset' trimmed-mean wording that split the ensemble yesterday: touch reading -> q high, running-cumulative-average reading -> q low. Independent primary-source check today: issuance 2026-07-01T16:04Z (full-month cumulative window); BTC (Coinbase spot) $64,416 now; July daily range $57,717-$64,669 -> BTC has NEVER touched $67.5k let alone $70k this month and the cumulative trimmed mean sits ~$62-63k. Yet market prices YES at 0.25-0.28 (OI 75k, liquid). A ~15-20pt naive gap against a liquid, minute-data-holding MM is a vol-model disagreement, not an information edge. Not priceable to real-money precision -> skip.
sources: reports/research_2026-07-10.json (prior arbiter KILL of $67.5k strike, same crux)

skipped.title: ETH trimmed mean ever above $2,250 by 11:59pm ET Jul 31, 2026?
skipped.reason: SKIP. Same MAXMON settlement ambiguity as BTC strikes. ETH (Coinbase spot) $1,821 now; July daily range $1,550-$1,831 -> never near $2,250 (+23.5% away). YES priced 0.07-0.09. Even under the favorable NO reading, buying deep NO at 0.91-0.93 for a few cents is the structurally negative-EV favorite-longshot leg the 8-person maker-harvest review already killed; and settlement is not priceable to precision. Skip.

skipped.title: Fed July 2026 decision family (maintain / hike 25bps / funds-rate above 3.75%)
skipped.reason: SKIP. (1) Already positioned: ledger holds H0-no (q0.73) and H25-yes (q0.24) as active swing legs, so the auto-pick 'no existing open position' rule excludes them. (2) No available edge: FOMC is 2026-07-29 (18d out) with a CPI print 2026-07-14 pending; the strikes carry FedWatch-grade efficiency (OI 2.4-3.5M). A blind LLM estimate's information set is a subset of this market's -> the blind-digest failure mode (memory: 07-10 Fed 0.025 nearly forced a false NO). No informational edge to manufacture; not researched further.
